highlights: Edit a VM: identity (name/owner/notes) live, CPU & memory with a power-off confirmation
Per-VM detailed view (disks, network, memory, power state) with last-synced + Refresh
Storage QoS — min/max IOPS or a named policy (where the storage fabric supports it)
Remove a disk — separate permission + type-the-VM-name confirmation (destructive)
Delete a VM — separate permission + type-the-VM-name confirmation + full audit
Every write action is per-action permission-controlled, risk-graduated, and audit-logged
